Items.Title: 'Typical Scotland': Tartan Army give their verdict on Miami match against Brazil
Items.Description: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.

Items.Title: Clarke downbeat on Scotland's knockout round hopes: 'I think we're going home'
Items.Description: Steve Clarke believes Scotland are "going home" after a damaging 3-0 defeat to Brazil in their final Group C game of the 2026 World Cup.

Items.Title: Scotland confession moments after defeat to Brazil over what's next at World Cup
Items.Description: Scotland were thrashed 3-0 by Brazil in their final group game at the World Cup, with John McGinn admitting it is "unlikely" they will progress
Items.Author: Samuel Meade,Kieran King

Items.Title: 365Scores Brasil

FALA, TORCEDOR! 🇧🇷🎙️
